topic: WhatsApp Business integration — how client requests flow into a tracked case instead of a group chat
format: Open with the specific operational problem, then show how one SmartPRO Hub feature addresses it end-to-end
post:
37 unread WhatsApp messages. One of them is a work permit request that expires tomorrow.

By Sunday morning, it's buried under 40 others. Nobody followed up. The deadline passed.

That's not a people problem. It's a process problem.

WhatsApp runs most client communication across Oman and GCC businesses — fine for quick questions, genuinely bad for requests that need tracking, ownership, and a paper trail.

SmartPRO Hub's WhatsApp Business integration converts incoming client messages into tracked cases inside the platform. The request gets logged, assigned to the right team member, and tied to the client's file. Automatically.

No copy-pasting into a spreadsheet. No "who's handling this?" thread in yet another group chat. No request vanishing because someone left the group.

Each case gets a status, a deadline, and one person responsible for it. Managers see the full pipeline. Clients get updates through the portal.

We built this because PRO service firms and Sanad offices kept telling us the same thing: the work isn't the hard part. Keeping track of it is.

If your team is managing client requests out of a group chat right now — how many are sitting unanswered?

Book a 30-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=feature-spotlight
